channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Stop guessing with your money. While the world panics, the top 1% are positioning themselves for the biggest wealth transfer in history.
channel.description: Stop guessing with your money. The global economy is changing faster than ever.

item.title: Welcome to emoji school
item.description: "Get ready to learn the language of the future. Welcome to Emoji School, where we're diving into the world of emojis and exploring their impact on modern communication. Check out this article from The Economist to learn more: https://www.economist.com/business/2026/03/26/welcome-to-emoji-school"
